```python
def shortest_palindrome():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    if not S:
        print("")
        return
    
    rev_S = S[::-1]
    combined = S + '#' + rev_S
    lps = [0] * len(combined)
    
    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    len_pal_prefix = lps[-1]
    add_str = S[:len(S) - len_pal_prefix][::-1]
    print(add_str + S)

shortest_palindrome()
```
